history.text: Fiji became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.
Fiji became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Fiji.

worthSeeing.title: Yasawa Islands:
worthSeeing.text: Remote volcanic islands with pristine beaches, caves, and Fijian village life.

worthSeeing.title: Mamanuca Islands:
worthSeeing.text: Popular island group with world-class surf breaks and luxury resorts.

worthSeeing.title: Coral Coast:
worthSeeing.text: Fringing reef and traditional villages along Viti Levu's southern coast.
